docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLIVARES, RAMIRO AS TO DEFENDANT ANTUNEZ, ROBERTO AN INDIVIDUAL DBA ROBERTO'S PAINTING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
